modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User unable to access YourFuture and PeopleAdmin due to authentication error.

full_description_text: 
User is trying to log into PeopleAdmin but gets an error: "No approved user found for external authentication." They also need access to the "Budget" user group in YourFuture. There seems to be an issue with the Year End Review sign-in process.
short_description: User unable to access YourFuture and PeopleAdmin due to authentication error.
description: User is trying to log into PeopleAdmin but gets an error: "No approved user found for external authentication." They also need access to the "Budget" user group in YourFuture. There seems to be an issue with the Year End Review sign-in process.
